text.title: tdd-workflow Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tdd-workflow as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent skips RED step — writes implementation and test together
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tests written after implementation confirm the implementation, not the specification. The test may pass but miss edge cases. Enforce RED step with a hook or explicit prompt: "Write a failing test first, do not write implementation yet."

failure-mode.description: Agent writes overly broad implementation in GREEN step (premature generalization)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: GREEN should be the minimal code to pass the current test only. Generalization happens in REFACTOR, driven by the next RED test.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: REFACTOR must not change behavior. If new behavior is needed, start a new RED-GREEN cycle.
